chinese_news.title: 曼联，要被卖了
chinese_news.summary:
图片来源：视觉中国

作者/余梦莹

报道/投资界PEdaily

史上最盛大世界杯正在上演。

48支球队、39天、104场比赛，总奖金飙升至8.71亿美元。梅西、C罗、莫德里奇“最后一舞”，哈兰德、姆巴佩、亚马尔崛起，诸神之战拉开帷幕。

赛场之外，一家老牌足球豪门却站在了十字路口——彭博社消息，掌控英超球队曼联超20年的格雷泽家族内部，近期正在讨论出售事宜。

绰号“红魔”，这是英格兰足球史上最富盛名的豪门。

chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑
chinese_news.summary:
在AI浪潮重塑全球产业逻辑的当下，传统留学路径所依赖的学历溢价与信息差正在系统性失效，大量高薪专业的基础性任务面临被AI批量化替代的风险。70/80后家长遭遇教育投资回报率骤降，05后年轻一代则陷入人机协同时代“何以确立自身不可替代价值”的身份焦虑。面对旧共识瓦解、新航线未明的历史性分水岭，36氪研究院与新通教育联合发布《AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑》。白皮书基于新通三十年积累的百万级家庭服务数据及36氪研究院对2030年全球新兴产业集群的前瞻研判，倡导回归全生命周期的长期主义，为留学家庭提供一份客观、中立的未来就业生存指南。

从“向外破局”到“向内扎根”：中国留学生三十年心理变迁史

中国留学行业三十年，其底层逻辑是一部中产家庭的教育焦虑与价值观重塑史。留学意义经历了五个阶段的变迁——从生存驱动、打破信息垄断的拓荒破冰，到追逐名校光环的晋升通道，再到就业预期前置的工具理性内卷，继而转入风险规避与心理议题凸显的疫情重塑期，直至当下AI浪潮中意义感赤字、情感支撑成为刚需的新阶段。

chinese_news.summary:
飞向宇宙、浩瀚无垠

作者｜曹思颀

编辑｜靖宇

6 月 12 日，在 SpaceX 正式挂牌当天，马斯克选择前往得州的星舰基地，和数百名员工一起，远程敲响了纳斯达克的开市钟。

在现场，他用熟悉的那股自嘲范儿说：「如果当年有人告诉我会有今天，我大概率觉得那个人嗑嗨了。因为当时我自己都认为这家公司会黄。」

chinese_news.title: 突发！Anthropic全球停用Claude 5
chinese_news.summary:
究竟为何，Anthropic突然下线了地表最强Claude？

【导读】上线72小时，最强Claude Fable 5被一纸禁令全球下架，连Anthropic自家外籍员工都不许碰。

太突然了！

就在刚刚，Anthropic官宣——

全球禁用外籍人士对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的所有访问权限。

无论是在美国境内还是境外，就连Anthropic的外籍员工，全都不可用。

上线才3天的Clau

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 核心材料成本降至进口材料五分之一，电致变色技术厂商获投，车规级产线建设中
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，中科电墨近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，由西安龙鼎投资独家投资。本轮融资将主要用于车规级电致变色产线建设、核心材料研发迭代以及汽车领域市场拓展。

伴随新能源汽车向智能化、舒适化方向升级，汽车玻璃正从传统结构件逐步演变为集隔热、防晒、隐私保护和交互体验于一体的功能件。尤其是全景天幕快速普及后，调光玻璃开始成为车企提升产品差异化的重要配置之一。

目前市场主流调光技术主要包括PDLC（液晶调光）、SPD（悬浮粒子调光）以及EC（电致变色）三种路线。PDLC和SPD主要依靠光散射实现遮蔽效果，普遍存在雾度较高、隔热能力有限、驱动电压较高等问题。而电致变色技术则通过材料发生氧化还原反应，实现玻璃透光率变化，不仅能够实现连续调光，同时具备低雾度、低能耗以及隔绝红外热辐射等优势，被认为是下一代智能玻璃的重要技术路线之一。

中科电墨成立于2023年，专注于电致变色核心材料及器件研发。公司首席科学家马明明博士长期从事导电高分子材料研究，于2017年成功研发出相关核心材料体系。通过引入自主设计的导电聚合物材料，中科电墨突破了长期由海外

chinese_news.title: SpaceX 2万亿美元市值这一夜，回望中国商业航天十年冷暖
chinese_news.summary:
6月12日晚，SpaceX以史上最大估值完成IPO，股价冲高至176美元，截至目前市值已经突破2万亿美元。 马斯克成为历史上第一位万亿美元身价的富豪。

马斯克在得克萨斯“星际基地”（Starbase）敲钟

其实在SpaceX敲钟之前，大洋彼岸的行业水温早已接近沸腾。

过去半年，商业航天成为国内一级市场最热的赛道之一。投资人排队约见创始人，地方政府争抢项目落地，一些过去很少关注航天的基金，也开始研究火箭、卫星和星座。“头部项目现在整个市场有几

SpaceX市值破2.1万亿美元，马斯克身家达巴菲特7倍

当地时间6月12日，万众瞩目的太空探索公司SpaceX于在纳斯达克交易所完成了上市。SpaceX是有史以来规模最大的IPO，发行价定为135美元，对应市值达1.77万亿美元。该股开盘价150美元，午盘涨幅一度突破30%触及176.53美元，随后股价震荡回落收盘报160.99美元，涨幅19.22%，跻身美国市值第六大企业，总市值达到2.1万亿美元。马斯克的个人财富随之升至约1.05万亿美元，成为全球首位净资产超过万亿美元的富翁。这相当于瑞士全年GDP，根据彭博

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX maintain a market cap above $1.8 trillion through 2026 year-end?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX just IPO'd at $2.2T with Musk becoming first trillionaire; retail euphoria and institutional momentum create mispricing risk on both sides.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC/BBC report of SpaceX Nasdaq debut at $2.2T valuation; moderate volatility despite huge volume suggests conviction rather than panic.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will U.S.-Iran peace deal be signed before 2026-06-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Pakistan PM says deal could finalize 'in next 24 hours'; Trump administration officials signaling imminent closure; geopolitical risk repricing is live.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC/BBC reports of near-finalized U.S.-Iran peace negotiations; senior Trump official confirmation of timeline.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Anthropic's Claude model restrictions remain in place through 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Anthropic disabled Fable 5 and Mythos 5 due to U.S. export control directive; this is the first major AI model shutdown for national security—signals regulatory escalation.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC/BBC/36Kr breaking news of Anthropic suspension; Hacker News top discussion (2774 score) on government directive.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC steadied above $63K after worst week in months on macro rescue; 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold Bitcoin (Saylor/Musk narrative); corporate adoption tailwind emerging.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk reports of BTC stabilization and Mag8 Bitcoin allocation; macro dovish signals supporting risk-on sentiment.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the ETH/BTC ratio exceed 0.055 before 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: ETH futures showing bearish signal but staker resilience points to underlying strength; perpetual futures becoming crypto's 'ETF moment' creates structural demand differentiation.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph analysis of ETH futures weakness vs. staker conviction; CoinDesk piece on perpetual futures institutional adoption.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Warner Bros–Paramount merger close and achieve operational synergy targets by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC filing / company investor relations announcement of merger close; subsequent quarterly earnings guidance.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market is focused on antitrust approval (just granted) but ignoring execution risk; $111B integration is complex, and AI content displacement creates asset write-down risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: WSJ/Reuters will report integration timelines and first sign of content portfolio rationalization post-close.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Switzerland's population cap vote pass and trigger suspension of EU free-movement agreement by 2026-12-15?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Swiss Federal Statistical Office referendum results; official EU statement on free-movement treaty status.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: English media underreporting political risk of populist right-wing success; Swiss franc / EUR pair sensitivity is high but consensus is complacent.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Right-wing Swiss People's Party mobilization + polling edge + EU diplomatic warnings (watch Politico/FT for EU negotiation signals).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Novo Nordisk or Eli Lilly's combined market cap in obesity drugs exceed $500B by 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bloomberg market cap data for Novo (NOVO.CO) and Eli Lilly (LLY); sum of combined market caps.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports drugmakers 'racing' to crack obesity market but obesity drug sector valuation is still de-rated vs. realistic TAM and CAGR.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Phase 3 trial readouts from Roche, Amgen, Viking Therapeutics in H2 2026; reimbursement decisions in EU/US.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will MicroStrategy sell more than $500M in Bitcoin holdings during 2026 (calendar year)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: MicroStrategy quarterly 10-Q filings; press releases on Bitcoin sales.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Saylor recently stated Bitcoin sales are 'necessary for digital credit business'—suggests tactical liquidation forthcoming, but market still assumes accumulation narrative.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: MicroStrategy earnings call guidance on digital credit financing; any announcement of BTC collateral-backed lending facility.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. impose new export restrictions on Anthropic, OpenAI, or xAI AI models before 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Department of Commerce BIS (Bureau of Industry and Security) official directive or Federal Register notice.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Anthropic shutdown is test case for enforceability; market is not pricing escalation path or sector-wide freeze risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hacker News continued discussion of export control enforcement; Reuters / Bloomberg reporting on DoC follow-up actions; Anthropic/OpenAI C-suite comments on compliance burden.

investment_theses.thesis: U.S. geopolitical de-escalation (Iran deal, Venezuela gang leader elimination) reduces energy risk premium; oil should trade lower into 2026-Q3 on demand normalization.
supporting_signals: Iran deal described as imminent by Pakistan PM and Trump officials (CNBC/BBC)
Trump administration escalating Venezuela action (gang leader strike) signals contained rather than expanding conflict
Risk-off macro rescue occurred *despite* ongoing Middle East tensions, suggesting de-escalation was repriced
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal could collapse if hardliners reject terms; Israel striking Lebanon signals broader regional instability and potential rapid escalation.
investment_theses.expression: Short energy (DBC, USO) or long USD/short crude oil (CL perpetuals); long USD dollar index (DXY) if safe-haven bid weakens.

investment_theses.thesis: SpaceX IPO creates 'Mag8 plus SpaceX' momentum; 25% of mega-cap tech now holds Bitcoin, creating structural bid for BTC; expect upside volatility into Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Saylor to Musk—Thanks to you, 25% of Mag8 firms now hold bitcoin'
SpaceX IPO $2.2T valuation and Musk becoming first trillionaire amplifies founder-wealth narrative favoring hard assets
BTC steadied above $63K on macro rescue; this was a floor-test, not capitulation
investment_theses.counter_view: Corporate Bitcoin holdings are narrative; recession or equity drawdown could trigger forced liquidation; volatility can swing both ways.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC (spot or 3–6 month perps); long BTC/USD ratio via Bybit or Deribit; ETH/BTC outperformance if Ethereum staker resilience thesis proves correct.

investment_theses.thesis: Anthropic model suspension is opening bid in AI export controls; OpenAI and xAI face similar risk; market is pricing zero probability of sector-wide restriction despite high-profile government action.
supporting_signals: Anthropic suspended Fable 5 and Mythos 5 immediately on government directive (CNBC/BBC/36Kr)
Hacker News top discussion (2774 score) signals technical community awareness of precedent-setting enforcement
36Kr reports global suspension ('全球停用'), not just U.S., indicating potential extraterritorial scope
investment_theses.counter_view: This is isolated to Anthropic's most powerful models; OpenAI and xAI have different architectures and may not trigger same controls; regulatory scope unclear.
investment_theses.expression: Short Anthropic pre-IPO shares (if available on secondary markets); fade AI infrastructure hardware plays (NVDA call spreads) on AI sentiment downside; long cyber-security / compliance software (CrowdStrike, Fortinet calls).

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese commercial spaceflight sector (signaled by 36Kr piece on '十年冷暖') faces accelerated obsolescence vs. SpaceX $2T valuation; Chinese venture capital will rotate from space into semiconductor and AI chip design.
supporting_signals: 36Kr editorial: 'SpaceX 2万亿美元市值这一夜，回望中国商业航天十年冷暖' (SpaceX $2T valuation and retrospective on Chinese space sector's 10 years of ups and downs)
Chinese space startups face capital reallocation; 'Ning Wang system' (宁王系) companies queuing for IPO signals capital preference for battery/semiconductor over space
FLAG: Chinese sources surfacing space sector narrative erosion before English media caught on
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese space policy could mandate domestic champions and restrict SpaceX competition; government could accelerate subsidies to domestic firms.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA / semiconductor hardware calls; short Chinese space-adjacent venture indexes (if liquid); long battery/EV supply chain (MU, SSNLF) as capital flows rebalance.

investment_theses.thesis: Perpetual futures becoming crypto's 'ETF moment' creates institutional venue shift; Bittensor (TAO) and Morpho (seen in $175M raise) benefit from structural move to on-chain derivatives and credit infrastructure.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Perpetual futures could become crypto's next ETF moment'
Morpho completed $175M raise signaling VC capital influx into on-chain credit/derivatives infrastructure
TAO and other compute/infrastructure tokens trending on crypto feeds; TAO is leveraged play on AI + compute + on-chain settlement
investment_theses.counter_view: Perpetual futures are high-risk, leverage-heavy products; institutional adoption could trigger volatility and regulatory scrutiny (CFTC may restrict offerings).
investment_theses.expression: Long TAO (Bittensor compute token); long Morpho-adjacent yield plays (aUSDC, Curve governance); long crypto infrastructure ETFs (IBIT, ETHW).
